execution.actual_execution_order_note: All four self runs were completed and gated before any PLAIN-ROLL run, as required by the anomaly stop rule. requested_condition_number preserves the supervisor list numbering.

technical_failed_attempts.outcome: shell wrapper timed out after 1980.9 seconds before any PLAIN-ROLL bundle or candidate was published; no process survived
Python -c argument split caused SyntaxError before imports or JVM start

implementation.execution_mode: serial; prepare A, prepare B, compare

health.extract_template_internal_timing_scope: FingerprintImageOptions construction, FingerprintImage construction, FingerprintTemplate extraction, and FingerprintTemplate.toByteArray serialization; excludes HTTP, JSON, request Base64 decoding, and response Base64 encoding.
health.verify_internal_timing_scope: FingerprintTemplate deserialization for both templates, FingerprintMatcher construction, and FingerprintMatcher.match; excludes HTTP, JSON, and request Base64 decoding.

negative_pairing.rule: next subject within the same canonical finger position, circular shift by one

reproducibility.authoritative_policy: canonical full v2 for self/genuine; identical-pair-only current derived reference for negative

selection.rule: first 500 data rows in existing file order; no resorting, sampling, or score-based selection

source_cohort.qualification: all four sd300b/sd300c PLAIN/ROLL self scores >= 40
